nasb.text: But the Lord has taken you and brought you out of the iron furnace, from Egypt, to be a people for His own possession, as today.

esv.text: But the Lord has taken you and brought you out of the iron furnace, out of Egypt, to be a people of his own inheritance, as you are this day.

cnv.text: 耶和華卻把你們從埃及，從鐵爐那裡領出來，作他自己的產業，自己的人民，像今日一樣。

ccb.text: 耶和华拯救你们脱离埃及那座熔铁炉，让你们做祂自己的子民，正如今日的情形。
